items.title: 🇧🇷World-changing AI companies are coming from Brazil.
items.title_zh: 🇧🇷改变世界的人工智能公司来自巴西。
items.description: 🇧🇷World-changing AI companies are coming from Brazil. That’s why we’ve officially expanded our Google AI Futures Fund to Brazil, partnering with venture capital leader Monashees to launch the Gama Fund. We’re looking for an elite cohort…
items.description_zh: 🇧🇷改变世界的人工智能公司来自巴西。这就是为什么我们正式将 Google AI 期货基金扩展到巴西，并与风险投资领军企业 Monashees 合作推出 Gama 基金。我们正在寻找精英群体……

items.title: Bim bada boum.
items.description: Bim bada boum. I am in France for the week and we are rolling out all the most exciting Codex features across Europe. Coincidence or did the team think I wasn't able to be productive otherwise? https://t.co/LilIl4XkJF
items.description_zh: Bim bada boum。我在法国待了一周，我们将在欧洲推出所有最令人兴奋的 Codex 功能。是巧合还是团队认为我无法提高工作效率？ https://t.co/LilIl4XkJF

items.title: This was fixed.
items.description: This was fixed. You know what's coming 👀 Give us 24 hours to reset the Codex rate limits across all plans. https://t.co/vx3Jb7YT6K
items.description_zh: 这是固定的。您知道接下来会发生什么 👀 请给我们 24 小时的时间来重置所有计划的 Codex 费率限制。 https://t.co/vx3Jb7YT6K

items.title: Oy.
items.description: Oy. We are aware that some Codex users are experiencing high error rates with "model at capacity" and are working to bring things back to being stable. https://t.co/R3dCKGGtQw
items.description_zh: 哎哟。我们知道，一些 Codex 用户在“模型满负荷”时遇到了较高的错误率，并且正在努力使情况恢复稳定。 https://t.co/R3dCKGGtQw

items.title: Publishing a new tutorial to make Codex or Claude Code your personal advisor using a skil…
items.title_zh: 发布新教程，让 Codex 或 Claude Code 使用技能成为您的个人顾问……
items.description: Publishing a new tutorial to make Codex or Claude Code your personal advisor using a skill with 4 files. Plus, I managed to save Fable's advice too before it got restricted 🥲 📌 Subscribe to get the tutorial tmr: https://t.co/MbOfeFUJbn h…
items.description_zh: 发布新教程，让 Codex 或 Claude Code 成为您的个人顾问，使用 4 个文件的技能。另外，我也设法在《神鬼寓言》受到限制之前保存了它的建议🥲📌订阅以获取教程tmr：https://t.co/MbOfeFUJbn h…

items.title: Honestly I don't want to be a hater but I feel like this is what happens when nobody inte…
items.title_zh: 老实说，我不想成为一个仇恨者，但我觉得这就是当没有人参与时会发生的事情......
items.description: Honestly I don't want to be a hater but I feel like this is what happens when nobody internally wants to tell the CEO no. Maybe this thing will blow our socks off? https://t.co/PRD3LeNy03
items.description_zh: 老实说，我不想成为一个仇恨者，但我觉得当内部没有人愿意告诉首席执行官不时就会发生这种情况。也许这件事会让我们大吃一惊？ https://t.co/PRD3LeNy03

items.description: over the last century, we’ve treated the intellect as a defining human trait and under-invested in other aspects that make us uniquely human, such as self-awareness, intuition, compassion and kindness. the next few years will force us to r…
